depends_on.name: recipient_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the subject that received the transferred entity.

depends_on.name: donor_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the subject from which the entity was transferred, if applicable.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.documentation: The time that the transfer occurred, specified as a datenum (if global clock) or in seconds (if local clock).

fields.name: clocktype
fields.documentation: The clock type of the timestamp. Use a global clock if available.

fields.name: entity_name
fields.documentation: The human-readable name of the entity that was transferred (e.g., 'blood' or 'medium'). Paired with `entity_ontology_node`.

fields.name: entity_ontology_node
fields.documentation: Ontology node identifier of the entity that was transferred, as a CURIE (e.g., 'EMPTY:0000002', 'UBERON:3373'). Paired with `entity_name`.

fields.name: method_name
fields.documentation: The human-readable name of the method used to transfer the entity (e.g., 'blood transfusion' or 'titanium pick'). Paired with `method_ontology_node`.

fields.name: method_ontology_node
fields.documentation: Ontology node identifier of the transfer method, as a CURIE (e.g., 'EMPTY:0000002', 'UBERON:3373'). Paired with `method_name`.
